text:
A squirrel named Sparkles loved exploring beneath the dense shade of ancient oaks in Silver Wood. One bright day, Sparkles discovered a peculiar purple leaf. It looked odd but certainly wasn't harmful. With excitement, Sparkles hid it deep in her squirrelly stash.

Later, a wise old owl named Oliver heard about Sparkles' discovery. Intrigued, Oliver decided to take a tour of Silver Wood. He saw sparks of color in many spots but never a purple one. Finally, he chatted with Sparkles.

"Ah, you've found a rare gem," Oliver cooed. "It has magical power. But do not tell anyone; the wise sages of Silver Wood don't appreciate such surprises."

Sparkles nodded wisely. She had no intention of sharing her secret.

Every day after that, Sparkles poked at purple leaves, observing their peculiar glow. One day, a soft hum filled the air. A gentle hummingbird had landed nearby, exploring the tree.
